name: my-workstation-lab
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'set -Eeuo pipefail; nix profile add nixpkgs#home-manager nixpkgs#statix nixpkgs#nixpkgs-fmt; DOTFILES_USER="$USER" DOTFILES_HOME="$HOME" NIX_SYSTEM="$(nix eval --impure --raw --expr builtins.currentSystem)" nix flake check --impure ${containerWorkspaceFolder}/nix'
